cases.title: TS-21f: Instructor layout exposes only instructor-scoped nav — zero /admin routes in permitted set
preconditions: Bootstrap complete; seeded Instructor with session:read and report:read per roles-permissions §2.2
API and web app running; Instructor authenticated via session cookie
steps: GET /api/v1/auth/me with Instructor session and assert role Instructor
Resolve permitted nav descriptors for InstructorLayout via API or nav module
Assert every returned route matches /sessions, /reports, or instructor sub-routes only
Assert zero descriptors with route prefix /admin
GET /api/v1/users or GET /api/v1/admin/users (admin user list endpoint per API design) with Instructor session
Assert HTTP 403 Forbidden with errorCode Forbidden per roles-permissions §2.5
cases.expected: Testing-plan §3 TS-21f and AC-18a satisfied: FR-18 nav visibility rule — instructor chrome never includes cross-role admin destinations; direct admin API denied

cases.title: usePermittedNav filters nav descriptors by permission matrix — unauthorized items omitted
preconditions: Nav descriptor catalog loaded from roles-permissions §2.3a (StudentLayout, InstructorLayout, AdminLayout)
filterPermittedNav or usePermittedNav module boundary available for integration test without browser
steps: Invoke filterPermittedNav with Student permissions [checkin:submit, attendance:read (self)]
Assert returned items include Điểm danh → /check-in and Lịch sử → /history
Assert zero items with route prefix /admin, /sessions, or /reports
Invoke filterPermittedNav with Instructor permissions [session:read] only (report:read absent)
Assert Buổi học → /sessions present; Báo cáo → /reports absent from result array
Invoke filterPermittedNav with full TrainingOfficeAdmin permission set
Assert all admin sidebar items from §2.3a present including Trang chủ, Người dùng, Lớp học, Môn học, Danh sách ghi danh, Nhập danh sách, Báo cáo, Xuất CSV, and Chính sách
cases.expected: Tag-specific component hint satisfied: usePermittedNav omits nav items user lacks; cross-role prefixes never co-mingle per BR-14 and FR-18 nav visibility rule

cases.title: RoleHomeHub card catalog filtered by permission — unauthorized cards omitted not disabled
preconditions: RoleHomeHub card descriptor table mapped to permissions per page-list §5.0 and common-ui-components RoleHomeHub
filterHubCards(permissions[]) module API or equivalent integration boundary
steps: Invoke filterHubCards with full admin permissions including policy:write
Assert cards for Quản lý người dùng, Lớp học, Môn học, Danh sách ghi danh, Nhập CSV, Báo cáo, Xuất CSV, and Chính sách all returned
Invoke filterHubCards with admin permissions excluding policy:write
Assert Chính sách card absent from result (not present with disabled flag)
Assert remaining cards href values point only to routes user still holds permission for
Invoke filterHubCards for Student with checkin:submit and attendance:read
Assert Quét mã điểm danh and Xem lịch sử cards present per StudentLayout §5.3
Invoke filterHubCards for Instructor with session:read and report:read
Assert Tạo buổi học mới and Báo cáo điểm danh cards present per AC-18d
cases.expected: Module-integration at hub card boundary: permission-filtered quick links match FR-18; unauthorized destinations omitted from descriptor set per BR-14

cases.title: Post first-admin bootstrap: permission resolver enables /admin hub nav descriptors
preconditions: Real PostgreSQL with User.count = 0
SetupService.createFirstAdmin and permission resolver module wired per identity-auth module breakdown
steps: GET /api/v1/setup/status and assert needsSetup true
Invoke createFirstAdmin with valid DTO and capture returned AuthSession
Resolve permission set for new TrainingOfficeAdmin from session context
Invoke filterPermittedNav with resolved permissions for AdminLayout
Assert Trang chủ → /admin, Người dùng → /admin/users, Lớp học → /admin/classes, and Môn học → /admin/subjects descriptors present
Invoke filterHubCards for admin hub and assert Quản lý người dùng, Lớp học, and Báo cáo cards returned
GET /api/v1/setup/status and assert needsSetup false
cases.expected: Tag-specific integration hint satisfied: setup status and first-admin API contracts produce admin session whose permission set enables FR-18 role home hub and nav filtering at module boundary

cases.title: POST /auth/login returns redirectTo role home hub per page-list §1 role table
preconditions: Bootstrap complete; seeded Student, Instructor, and TrainingOfficeAdmin accounts with active=true
API running at /api/v1
steps: POST /api/v1/auth/login with Student credentials and no returnUrl
Assert HTTP 200 and response body redirectTo is /check-in
POST /api/v1/auth/login with Instructor credentials
Assert HTTP 200 and redirectTo is /sessions
POST /api/v1/auth/login with TrainingOfficeAdmin credentials
Assert HTTP 200 and redirectTo is /admin per FR-18 role home specification
cases.expected: HTTP contract satisfied: login redirectTo resolves to role-specific home hub per page-list §1 default landing table and FR-18 role home behavior

cases.title: GET /auth/me returns role and permissions enabling correct nav scope per role
preconditions: Seeded Student, Instructor, and TrainingOfficeAdmin with standard role permission sets
Valid session cookies for each role
steps: GET /api/v1/auth/me with Student session cookie
Assert HTTP 200; body role Student; permissions include checkin:submit
GET /api/v1/auth/me with Instructor session
Assert HTTP 200; role Instructor; permissions include session:read
GET /api/v1/auth/me with TrainingOfficeAdmin session
Assert HTTP 200; role TrainingOfficeAdmin; permissions include user:read (all) and report:export
cases.expected: HTTP contract for GET /auth/me: authenticated profile includes role and permission set consumed by usePermittedNav for FR-18 nav filtering

cases.title: RBAC negative: Student and Instructor denied all /admin/* API surfaces
preconditions: RbacNegativeMatrix fixture per testing-plan §5 with Student and Instructor sessions
Representative admin endpoints: user list, GET /classes, GET /subjects, roster list, GET /admin/reports, POST /admin/export
steps: For each admin endpoint in matrix (including GET /classes and GET /subjects per AC-03i), invoke with Student session
Assert HTTP 403 for every request; no institution-wide data in response body
Repeat matrix with Instructor session for /admin/users, /classes, /subjects, /admin/rosters, /admin/reports, /admin/export
Assert HTTP 403 Forbidden or ExportNotAllowed per roles-permissions §2.5
Assert Instructor retains HTTP 200 on scoped routes GET /sessions and GET /reports when assigned
cases.expected: NFR-11 rbac-negative coverage for FR-18: non-admin roles cannot access admin API surfaces backing admin nav items; instructor retains scoped instructor permissions

cases.title: Boundary: Instructor without report:read omits Báo cáo from sidebar and hub descriptors
preconditions: Instructor test user provisioned with session:read only (report:read explicitly absent)
filterPermittedNav and filterHubCards integration APIs available
steps: Load Instructor permission set and assert report:read not granted
Invoke filterPermittedNav for InstructorLayout
Assert sidebar contains Buổi học only; Báo cáo item absent from array
Invoke filterHubCards for /sessions instructor hub
Assert Tạo buổi học mới present but Báo cáo / Báo cáo điểm danh card absent
Direct GET /reports with Instructor session returns HTTP 403 ReportAccessDenied or Forbidden
cases.expected: AC-18d boundary inverse: instructor hub and sidebar omit report destinations when report:read missing; direct URL still denied per BR-14 and FR-18 omission rule

cases.title: Flow A post-login: each role lands on role hub before workshop workflow continues
preconditions: Flow A seed data: admin, instructor, and student accounts from testing-plan §6 Flow A step 1
Bootstrap complete (needsSetup false)
steps: Authenticate TrainingOfficeAdmin via POST /api/v1/auth/login
Assert redirectTo /admin hub not /admin/users
Authenticate Instructor via login endpoint
Assert redirectTo /sessions with instructor-scoped nav only
Continue Flow A: instructor creates session — verify no admin paths exposed during navigation
Authenticate Student and assert redirectTo /check-in with student-only chrome
cases.expected: Flow A lifecycle includes correct FR-18 role home hub routing at login; permission-gated nav persists through early Flow A steps

cases.title: Tag-specific browser-journey: admin /admin hub NavCards deep-link only to permitted routes
preconditions: TrainingOfficeAdmin authenticated in browser with full admin permission set
Bootstrap complete; admin hub page reachable at /admin
steps: Navigate browser to /admin
Assert RoleHomeHub renders with QuickActionGrid of NavCard components
Collect href attributes from all visible NavCard anchor elements
Assert each href matches a permitted /admin/* route from page-list §5.0
Click Quản lý người dùng card and assert navigation to /admin/users without ForbiddenPage
Click Lớp học card and assert navigation to /admin/classes succeeds
Click Môn học card and assert navigation to /admin/subjects succeeds
Click Báo cáo card and assert navigation to /admin/reports succeeds
Navigate back to /admin and assert AdminLayout sidebar active item reflects current route
cases.expected: Tag-specific browser-journey hint satisfied: AC-18c admin hub cards provide working deep links to permitted admin workflow routes including class and subject catalogs

cases.title: Tag-specific browser-journey: usePermittedNav omits unauthorized AdminLayout sidebar items from DOM
preconditions: Bootstrap complete; TrainingOfficeAdmin authenticated in browser
Test admin user missing policy:write permission (or equivalent scoped fixture)
steps: Navigate browser to /admin with permission-reduced admin session
Inspect AdminLayout SidebarNav DOM via accessibility snapshot
Assert Chính sách (/admin/policy) nav item is absent from DOM (not disabled, not aria-disabled)
Assert permitted items such as Trang chủ, Người dùng, Lớp học, and Môn học remain visible
Assert RoleHomeHub omits Chính sách NavCard when policy:write missing
Direct-navigate to /admin/policy and assert ForbiddenPage without policy nav leaked in chrome
cases.expected: Tag-specific component hint satisfied: usePermittedNav filters nav items by permission matrix; unauthorized items omitted from DOM per BR-14 not merely disabled

cases.title: Tag-specific browser-journey: instructor layout chrome contains zero href matching /admin
preconditions: Instructor user authenticated in browser
Instructor on /sessions instructor role home
steps: Navigate authenticated Instructor to /sessions
Query all anchor elements within InstructorLayout chrome (sidebar, TopBar, RoleHomeHub)
Assert zero href attributes match /admin or /admin/* regex
Resize viewport below md and open hamburger drawer sidebar; re-scan anchors
Direct navigate browser to /admin/users
Assert ForbiddenPage rendered inside RootLayout without AdminLayout sidebar or admin nav links
cases.expected: Tag-specific browser-journey hint satisfied: AC-18a and TS-21f — instructor chrome contains zero /admin links; forbidden direct URL shows 403 page without nav leak

cases.title: Student direct URL /admin/users shows ForbiddenPage with no admin links in student chrome
preconditions: Student authenticated in browser on /check-in
steps: While logged in as Student, inspect StudentLayout chrome (AppHeader, BottomNav) for any /admin href
Assert zero /admin links in bottom nav and page chrome per AC-18b
Navigate browser directly to /admin/users
Assert ForbiddenPage with Vietnamese permission message Bạn không có quyền visible
Assert StudentLayout (not AdminLayout) wraps the forbidden page
Assert no admin sidebar items rendered anywhere in DOM
cases.expected: AC-18b browser outcome: student forbidden on admin route; student chrome never displayed admin navigation links per FR-18 cross-role rule

cases.title: Instructor with report:read sees Tạo buổi học mới and Báo cáo links on /sessions hub
preconditions: Instructor authenticated with session:read and report:read per standard role matrix
No blocking active-session-only gating on hub cards
steps: Navigate authenticated Instructor to /sessions
Assert RoleHomeHub section visible above session list
Assert NavCard or link with text Tạo buổi học mới present and href targets /sessions/new
Assert NavCard or link with text Báo cáo or Báo cáo điểm danh present with href /reports
Click Báo cáo card and assert navigation to /reports without ForbiddenPage
cases.expected: AC-18d satisfied: instructor role home hub shows permitted workflow quick links for session creation and reports per FR-18

cases.title: Authenticated user visiting / redirects to role home hub per role table
preconditions: Seeded accounts for Student, Instructor, and TrainingOfficeAdmin
Bootstrap complete (needsSetup false)
steps: Log in as Student, navigate browser to /
Assert URL becomes /check-in; assert [data-testid="route-discovery-panel"] absent from DOM
Log out; log in as Instructor, navigate to /
Assert URL becomes /sessions; assert route discovery panel not rendered
Log out; log in as TrainingOfficeAdmin, navigate to /
Assert URL becomes /admin with RoleHomeHub visible; assert ShellOverviewPage and RouteDiscoveryPanel not shown
cases.expected: AC-18e and AC-18g browser outcome: root route redirects each authenticated role to documented role home per page-list §1; route discovery section never shown when session exists

cases.title: Student RoleHomeHub on /check-in shows permitted quick-link cards only
preconditions: Student authenticated in browser
Check-in flow idle (no active camera scan step)
steps: Navigate browser to /check-in when idle
Assert RoleHomeHub student variant renders above scan entry point per StudentLayout §5.3
Assert Quét mã điểm danh card present with link to scan flow
Assert Xem lịch sử card present with href /history
Assert zero cards linking to /admin, /sessions, or /reports routes
Click Xem lịch sử card and assert navigation to /history with StudentLayout bottom nav
cases.expected: FR-18 student role home hub displays permission-filtered workflow cards with Vietnamese hints; cross-role destinations omitted per BR-14

cases.title: Tag-specific browser-journey: unauthenticated / shows RouteDiscoveryPanel with four Vietnamese entry links (AC-18f)
preconditions: Bootstrap complete (needsSetup false)
No active session cookie; browser logged out
steps: Navigate browser to / without authentication
Assert ShellOverviewPage showcase content visible
Assert [data-testid="route-discovery-panel"] present with section heading Đi tới trang
Assert link [data-testid="route-discovery-login"] labeled Đăng nhập with href /login
Assert link [data-testid="route-discovery-check-in"] labeled Điểm danh with href /check-in
Assert link [data-testid="route-discovery-sessions"] labeled Buổi học with href /sessions
Assert link [data-testid="route-discovery-admin"] labeled Quản trị with href /admin
Click Đăng nhập and assert navigation to /login
Return to /; click Điểm danh without session and assert redirect to /login with returnUrl containing /check-in per BR-06
cases.expected: AC-18f satisfied: unauthenticated / exposes RouteDiscoveryPanel with four Vietnamese-labeled entry links and data-testids; protected targets auth-redirect to login with returnUrl per FR-18 chrome-less route discovery

cases.title: Tag-specific browser-journey: admin on /admin/rosters/import has singleton active nav — Nhập danh sách only (AC-18h)
preconditions: TrainingOfficeAdmin authenticated with roster:read and roster:write permissions
Bootstrap complete
steps: Navigate authenticated TrainingOfficeAdmin to /admin/rosters/import
Within AdminLayout sidebar, query all nav links with aria-current="page"
Assert exactly one element has aria-current="page"
Assert the active link text is Nhập danh sách and href is /admin/rosters/import
Assert Danh sách ghi danh nav item is present but lacks aria-current="page" and active styling classes
Assert no other sidebar items share active styling simultaneously
cases.expected: AC-18h and BR-14a satisfied: on /admin/rosters/import exactly one nav item is active (Nhập danh sách); parent prefix item Danh sách ghi danh is not active per §6.2a match rules

cases.title: Tag-specific browser-journey: instructor on /sessions/new has singleton active nav — Buổi học only (AC-18i)
preconditions: Instructor authenticated with session:read and report:read
Bootstrap complete
steps: Navigate authenticated Instructor to /sessions/new
Within InstructorLayout sidebar, query all nav links with aria-current="page"
Assert exactly one element has aria-current="page"
Assert the active link text is Buổi học
Assert Báo cáo nav item lacks aria-current="page" and active styling despite /sessions/new sharing /sessions prefix
Assert active item uses prefix match per §6.2a (NavLink end={false} for Buổi học descriptor)
cases.expected: AC-18i and BR-14a satisfied: on /sessions/new exactly one instructor sidebar item shows active styling (Buổi học); sibling Báo cáo remains inactive per §6.2a prefix rules

cases.title: Chrome-less auth route: /login footer exposes Quay về trang chủ link to /
preconditions: Bootstrap complete (needsSetup false)
Browser logged out; no active session cookie
steps: Navigate browser to /login
Assert AuthLayout renders LoginForm without role shell chrome
Assert footer link with text Quay về trang chủ present and href is /
Click Quay về trang chủ and assert navigation to /
Assert ShellOverviewPage and RouteDiscoveryPanel visible on / per AC-18f
cases.expected: FR-18 chrome-less navigation aid satisfied: /login exposes visible link back to / so users need not memorize URLs per page-list §2.1 and 06-app-layout-components §4

cases.title: NotFoundPage (404): recovery CTA Về trang chủ targets role home when authenticated
preconditions: Bootstrap complete; seeded Student, Instructor, and TrainingOfficeAdmin accounts
steps: Log in as Student and navigate browser to /nonexistent-route-404-test
Assert NotFoundPage renders with heading Không tìm thấy trang and button Về trang chủ
Click Về trang chủ and assert URL becomes /check-in (student role home per page-list §1)
Log out; log in as Instructor; navigate to /unknown-path-404-test
Click Về trang chủ and assert URL becomes /sessions
Log out; log in as TrainingOfficeAdmin; navigate to /missing-page-404-test
Click Về trang chủ and assert URL becomes /admin with RoleHomeHub visible
cases.expected: FR-18 error-route rule satisfied: catch-all 404 recovery CTA navigates each authenticated role to documented role home hub per page-list §2.3 and wireframes §14.2

cases.title: NotFoundPage (404): recovery CTA Về trang chủ targets /login when unauthenticated
preconditions: Bootstrap complete (needsSetup false)
No active session cookie; browser logged out
steps: Navigate browser to /does-not-exist-404 while logged out
Assert NotFoundPage renders with Về trang chủ button visible
Click Về trang chủ and assert navigation to /login
Assert LoginForm visible in AuthLayout without role shell chrome
cases.expected: FR-18 error-route rule satisfied: unauthenticated 404 recovery CTA targets /login per page-list §2.3; chrome-less route provides sensible next destination

cases.title: ForbiddenPage (/forbidden): recovery CTA Về trang chủ targets role home when authenticated
preconditions: Bootstrap complete; Student and Instructor sessions available in browser
steps: Log in as Student and navigate browser directly to /forbidden
Assert ForbiddenPage renders with title Không có quyền truy cập and button Về trang chủ
Click Về trang chủ and assert URL becomes /check-in
Log out; log in as Instructor; navigate to /forbidden
Click Về trang chủ and assert URL becomes /sessions
cases.expected: FR-18 error-route rule satisfied: /forbidden recovery CTA returns authenticated user to role home hub per 06-app-layout-components §9.4 and wireframes §14.1
